shared_attributes.design_principle: static background elements, minimal detail to keep focus on Echo

context.role: container for seeds, shows food level (full/low/empty), feeding interaction target
context.usage_scenario: always visible, player clicks to feed, displays 3 states based on food_level (0=empty, 1=low, 2=full)

animation.description: 3 static states: empty (frame 1), low (frame 2), full (frame 3), switched based on food_level variable

visual_specification.details: State 0 (empty): brown bowl outline only. State 1 (low): 3-4 seed pixels (#FFA300) in bowl. State 2 (full): 6-8 seed pixels (#FFA300) filling bowl

relationships.shared_with: shares brown color (#AB5236) with perch, seeds share color with Echo's body
relationships.differences_from: interactive element (clickable), has 3 visual states unlike static elements, directly affects Echo's hungry state

explicit_negations: no individual seed detail (cluster representation only)
no overflow (seeds stay within bowl bounds)
